Syria (2014)

American Wars Kill Children

In the last 20 years of American wars, here is how many children

were killed in the first 20 days, each time.

US-Yemen (2025)

Afghanistan (2001)

Israel-Iran (The 12 Day war)(2025)

Israel-Iran (2026)

Iraq War / Second Gulf War (2003)

Somalia (2007)

*Each figure represents one child

*Children killed in Gaza in the first 20 days of war are not included here.

Israel killed 3,000 children with America-funded weapons in just the first 20 days.

*Several conflicts like drone strikes in Pakistan, and Libya, are not shown, because of no reported deaths of children in the first 20 days.

*Each figure represents one child

*Children killed in Gaza in the first 20 days of war are not included here.

Israel killed 3,000 children with America-funded weapons in just the first 20 days.

*Several conflicts like drone strikes in Pakistan, and Libya, are not shown, because of no reported deaths of children in the first 20 days.

American Wars Kill Children

In the last 20 years of American wars, here is how many children

were killed in the first 20 days, each time.

Afghanistan (2001)

Somalia (2007)

Syria (2014)

Iraq War / Second Gulf War (2003)

US-Yemen (2025)

Israel-Iran (The 12 Day war)

(2025)

Israel-Iran (2026)

*Each figure represents one child

*Children killed in Gaza in the first 20 days of war are not included here.Israel killed 3,000 children with America-funded weapons in just the first 20 days.

*Several conflicts like drone strikes in Pakistan, and Libya, are not shown, because of no reported deaths of children in the first 20 days.
